prompt.content:
Calculate the total enterprise value (TEV) using the terminal value – growth in perpetuity approach for S&P Global (consolidated entity) under the following assumptions:
•	Run the DCF model with the mid‑year convention adjustment turned off.
•	Update the valuation date to February 1, 2026
•	Increase preferred stock to 25,000 and assign a cost of preferred stock of 6.5%
•	Set the risk‑free rate equal to the 1‑month U.S. Treasury yield as of December 31, 2025.

Present the result in USD millions, rounded to the nearest dollar.

rubrics.name: States that Total Enterprise value (EV) - growth in perpetuity approach is... (ver_a32058b54c7a4df69ae5997209b271fe)

messages.content: States that Total Enterprise value (EV) - growth in perpetuity approach is $155,861 million (acceptable range $154,302 to $157,420).

golden_responses.golden_text_response: Total Enterprise value (EV) - growth in perpetuity approach is $155,861 million
